title: Enhanced Dragon Egg
description: Enhanced model with an amazing emissive texture.
body:
# **Enhanced Dragon Egg.**
This is **Enhanced Dragon Egg (EDG)**,
formerly known as **Better Dragon Egg**, **EDG** modifies the textures and the original dragon egg model.

- Builds on the original model.
- Has emissive textures.
- Compatible with your favorite Shaders!
- Feel free to use this resource pack wherever you want.
## **VANILLA**
![VANILLA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/323cb436a36f164e421e9cb22a3f8d3a4dea45c4.png)
## **BSL SHADERS**
![BSL SHADERS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d2b52dfdcd166eaaa0f25682b0f0cbe68ce1d4a.png)
## **ASTRALEX SHADERS**
![ASTRALEX SHADERS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35816fd0942c99309532cf1583ee6d090dfbd80f.png)

## **Emissive model requeriments:**
**If you aren't using Optifine, make sure you have at least one of these mods installed: Continuity, MoreMcMeta Emissive Textures, or a mod that adds emissive textures to Minecraft.**

**Well, if you want to leave me a tip, https://ko-fi.com/mateusmg2010**

**Thanks for downloading :)**
